auth.not_authorized: You are not authorized to use this command!

dm.cleared_own: Removed {count} messages previously sent by the bot in your DMs.
dm.no_messages_own: No messages previously sent by the bot in your DMs.
dm.cant_clear_bot: I can't clear a bot's DM.

news.preview_description: This is how news will look per locale.

tickets.delete_countdown: This ticket will be deleted in 5 seconds...

dm.closed_by:
Your ticket **#{ticket_id}** has been closed by **{closer_name}**.
Thank you for contacting support!
dm.reopened_by:
Your ticket **#{ticket_id}** has been reopened by **{reopener_name}**.
You can continue the conversation.

tickets.confirm_close: Are you sure you would like to close this ticket?
tickets.max_reached: You already have {ticket_count} open ticket(s). Please close an existing ticket before creating a new one. (Maximum: {max})
tickets.creation_failed: Failed to create ticket. Please try again later.
tickets.not_configured: Ticket system is not properly configured. Please contact an administrator.
tickets.channel_failed: Failed to create ticket channel. Please try again later.

time.invalid_format: Invalid time format. Please use HH:MM (00-23:00-59).

temp_voice.configure_your_voice_channel_settings_be: Configure your voice channel settings below.
temp_voice.moved_to_existing: Moved you back to your existing channel: **{existing_empty_channel.name}**
temp_voice.transferred_ownership:
Transferred ownership to {selected_user}! They can now use the control panel.

Use the buttons below to control your channel.
temp_voice.select_user_to_transfer: Select a user to transfer ownership to:
temp_voice.locked: Channel locked! Users can see but not connect.

dm_invitation.invitation_message: {interaction.user.mention} has invited you to join their voice channel!

errors.cannot_transfer_to_bot: Cannot transfer ownership to a bot!
errors.cannot_invite_bots: Cannot invite bots to the channel!
errors.not_in_channel: {selected_user} must be in the voice channel to receive ownership!
errors.only_owner_can_unlock: Only the channel owner can unlock the channel!
errors.only_owner_can_permit: Only the channel owner can permit users!
errors.only_owner_can_lock: Only the channel owner can lock the channel!
errors.only_owner_can_reject: Only the channel owner can reject users!
errors.only_owner_can_invite: Only the channel owner can invite users!
errors.user_already_in_channel: User is already in the voice channel!
errors.only_owner_can_kick: Only the channel owner can kick users!
errors.not_in_voice_channel: {selected_user.mention} is not in the voice channel!
errors.only_owner_can_ghost: Only the channel owner can ghost the channel!
errors.only_owner_can_unghost: Only the channel owner can unghost the channel!
errors.only_owner_can_transfer: Only the channel owner can transfer ownership!
errors.only_owner_can_access_settings: Only the channel owner can access settings!
